{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of Calling Storms
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
| name = Sage of Calling Storms
| aliases = Calling Storms
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage of Calling Storms, Archlord
| abilities = divining the future, storm madra, call living lightning, regeneration
| affiliations = Stormcallers, Reigan Shen's subordinates
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Sage of Calling Storms Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of Calling Storms, also known as Calling Storms, is a powerful figure and the sole [[Sage]] within the [[Stormcaller cult]]. This group serves the [[Weeping Dragon]], a [[Dreadgod]], and utilizes [[madra]] derived from that entity to manipulate water, wind, and lightning. The [[Sage]] is characterized by a manic and crazed personality, often exhibiting hunger for divine truths or witnessing the divine with intense excitement. He is known for his mastery of lightning and was once highly regarded for his ability to divine the future, though he later became unable to perform this task. In combat, the [[Sage]] is a formidable force capable of using lightning to sear spirits and manipulate souls. He has been known to use his abilities to mutilate the spirit of others, such as Ziel of the Wastelands. His techniques involve living lightning and high-level [[spatial transfer]]. Even after his death, a [[Remnant]] of the [[Sage]] remains, characterized by a dedication to chaos and a defiant nature. The [[Sage]]'s power is closely tied to the [[Weeping Dragon]], and his followers utilize specialized markings, such as sparking rings of lightning around their arms, to signify their membership in the cult.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel dueled the [[Sage of Calling Storms]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] provides power to the [[Stormcallers]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] used research from the Arelius [[Monarch]] to damage Ziel's soul.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] wrestles against [[Fury]]’s authority.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] bound Ziel in place.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] was supposed to be the best at divining the future among [[Reigan Shen]]'s subordinates.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] screams as the world ends.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] believed they had seen the divine.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of Calling Storms is an [[Archlord]] and a monster who once inflicted spiritual pain upon Ziel by twisting his tools within the man's soul. This manic-looking man possesses pale hair and blue serpents of storm [[madra]] wrapped around his upper arms. His power crackles with the hungry lightning of the [[Weeping Dragon]], allowing him to call forth living lightning. Having invested heavily in regeneration, he is capable of recovering even from total destruction. Finally, the [[Sage]] left behind a [[Remnant]] dedicated to chaos.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] once subjected Ziel to spiritual pain by twisting his tools inside Ziel's soul.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms is a monster.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] is a manic-looking man with pale hair and blue serpents of storm [[madra]] encircling his upper arms.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms is the [[Sage of Calling Storms]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms' power crackles with the hungry lightning of the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms has invested in regeneration.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] is an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms can regenerate.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms uses storm [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms can call living lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Calling Storms is a character capable of regenerating even from total destruction.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Calling Storms]] left a [[Remnant]] dedicated to chaos.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“That was Death himself,” the Sage of Calling Storms said in awe.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
